basic_details.job_title: GTBH Senior Resident Doctors Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 65 Posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 05 years for SC/ST, 03 years for OBC

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma, MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field
qualification.details: MEDICINE: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field ENDOCRINOLOGY: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field RADIOLOGY: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field GENERAL SURGERY: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field BURNS & PLASTIC: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field NEUROSURGERY: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field PATHOLOGY: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field ANAESTHESIA: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field PEDIATRICS: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field HEMATOLOGY PEDIATRICS (ONCOLOGY): Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field ORTHOPAEDICS: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field OBST. & GYNAE: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field DEM (DIABETICS, ENDOCRINOLOGY AND METABOLISM) SURGERY: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field BIOCHEMISTRY: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field DEM BIOCHEMISTRY: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field A&E (ACCIDENT & EMERGENCY): Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field FORENSIC MEDICINE: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field OPHTHALMOLOGY: Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years experience in relevant field

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GTBH to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GTBH Senior Resident Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the GTBH Senior Resident Doctor posts is 29-06-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Resident Doctors at GTBH?
faq.answer: There are a total of 65 vacancies for the Senior Resident Doctor positions at Guru Teg Bahadur Hospital (GTBH).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident Doctor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree/DNB/PG Diploma or MBBS with 3 years of experience in the relevant field to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Senior Resident Doctor posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident Doctor positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 67700 Per Month, along with NPA (Non-Practicing Allowance).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the GTBH Senior Resident Doctor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the GTBH Senior Resident Doctor recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications for the GTBH Senior Resident Doctor posts must be submitted in Online mode.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Guru Teg Bahadur Hospital located?
faq.answer: Guru Teg Bahadur Hospital (GTBH) is located in Delhi, with the pincode 110095.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Senior Resident Doctor positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Senior Resident Doctor positions at GTBH is Ad-hoc.
